# maxcv

## What it is
Free AI-powered resume analyzer and improver. No sign-up required.
Built for LATAM job seekers, bilingual Spanish/English.

## What it does
Users upload a PDF resume and receive:
- A score (0-100) across 6 dimensions: ATS Compatibility, Achievement Impact, Structure & Format, Keyword Relevance, Writing Clarity, Completeness
- Specific improvement recommendations with evidence from the actual CV
- Before/after examples for each issue found
- A complete rewritten resume optimized for ATS systems

## Key differentiators
- Free forever (donation-supported, pay-what-you-want)
- No registration, no accounts, no data storage
- Spanish-first (built for LATAM job seekers, zero competitors in Spanish)
- Bilingual interface (Spanish + English)
- Powered by Claude (Anthropic) with Constitutional AI principles
- Open source (MIT license)
- Ethical: no discrimination, no fear tactics, evidence-based scoring only
- Anti-hallucination policy: every suggestion must reference actual CV content
- Privacy-first: CV processed in real time, deleted immediately, never stored

## Pages
- https://maxcv.org — Main app (analyze + improve CV)
- https://maxcv.org/how — How it works (technical architecture, open source)
- https://maxcv.org/security — Security & Privacy practices
- https://maxcv.org/privacy — Privacy Notice (LFPDPPP, GDPR, LGPD, CCPA, PIPEDA)
- https://maxcv.org/terms — Terms of Use

## Tech stack
Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Vercel, Claude API (Anthropic SDK)
6 production dependencies, 0 external UI libraries, MIT license

## Contact
security@maxcv.org

https://github.com/pixan-ai/maxcv
